text: Hi Vijay, i am from Hivericks. I see we spoke recently. Is now a good time?
Yes, it is a good time.
EXACTLY. The 'XOptimus Smart Charger' has been getting great reviews from satisfied customers who've noticed significant battery life improvements with this advanced surge protection technology.
What is the price of this product?
The price of the XOptimus Smart Charger (Wall Adapter) is ₹1499 INR (approx $18 USD).
